titleStmt.title: SII 30.182: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 182. (A.R. No. 258 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḻa II: year 4: 1056 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti of the king, portion of which are lost. It registers a sale of 25 vēli of land to the temple of Sri Rudrasōḻai-mahādēva situated in the southern bank of the river Tiruveḥka at Parākramasōḻa-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Dāmar-koṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, for 40 kāśu by the assembly of Veṇkuḷaṭṭūr in Kaḻumala-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam in the same maṇḍalam. It is also stated that out of 40 kāśu, 10 kāśu, for the price of land and other 30 kāśu, as deposit for paying tax. The madhyastha Sivakkoḻundu Chandrasēkaran and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
-puviyāḷuṭaic coḻakaṉṉakucciyarājaneṉṟum maṉṉu taṉ kātalar tanmun metaku caturarājama
ccilaikkai ceṉaiccevakaṉai nirupenntracoḻa (coḻa)neṉṟum parumaṇi cuṭar maṇimakuṭam cuṭṭi paṭimicai
raṭṭa maṇṭalameytit tiṅkaḷum nāṭum matikaḷum manegamum Iḻan=ta maḷavi tevama
pavamikku tenṟeri viḻitteḻu cepparukirtti koppatakavaiyil Uṭanṟa ṭaṅki porutavan ceñcaramāri tankuñcaramukatti
ḷpuyattilum taikkavum tanuṭak kaḷiṟeṟiya toṭukaḻalvirar maṭiyavu pakaiyātoru tani Anegam porupaṭai vaḻa
pi jayaciṅkaṉum poṟpuyakkeciyum tāṟtalapanmaṉum mānavannavaril maṇṭalikaḷ tokaiyanum mā
liraṭṭaiyaṉum ciṭṭiyal nanniyanuḷampaṉum Iruvar mutal Eṇṇili Araicarai viṇṇakatteṟṟi
yil paṭaikkuṇṭam Enṟinnava(ṉ)roṭañciya caḷukkikula (kula)kulai tulai mayir nuṟa neḷitta Aka
lotukki kālpaṟittoṭi melkaṭalpāyat turattiya poḻutul cerukkaḷattu Avan viṭu catturupuyaṅkaran nakara
pattirām pakaṭṭaṉ kaḻalmeṭṭi naṭaippa ḷum varāha velkoṭi mutal rājapariccinnamuṉ
kuḻāmum pāvaiyariṭṭamum muṉaivaiyiṟ koṇṭu vicai Abhiṣekañ ceytu tenṟicai
laṅkaiyiṟ Aṭaṟpaṭai kalaṅkāḻ vīracalāmekaṉai kāṟ kaḷiṟṟoṭum pakaikkatir muṭittu kaṭuviṭuntol Ilaṅkaik
pakaikaḷattiṭaip piṭittu cāvāp perupukaḻ vaḷartta kopparakecari vanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevaṟku
ṇṭu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu kāliyūrk koṭṭattuk kaḻumalanāṭṭu veṇkuḷattūr mahā sabhaiyom
śrīpontai kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Imaṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭup parākramacoḻaccaturvvetimaṅkalattuttiru vekkāvin te
śrīrudracolai māhadevar Ātitāsacaṇḍeśvaradevar pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu nāṟpatu Ikkācu nāṟpatum koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta bhūmi Āva
tu Eṅkaḷur kāṭeṟu kollai yippāḻ kiṭan=ta kāṇiyum Itankiḻ Oru na nel viḷaiñca nilamum varakuḷḷiṭṭup puṉcey nilam viḷaiyum nilamum kollai
yum viṟpataṟkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kīḻaimukaṭṭuk kollaikku meṟku teṟkellai subrahmaṇya vākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kuttinallūr Ellai
kkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellaikkuk periyeri nir pokaikkut teṟkum Innānkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattukku grahadravyaRead- kraiyatravyamttukku kācu pattu
Iṟai travyattukkuk kācu muppatum koṇṭu Innāṉkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mikitikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Irupattaiveli nilam viṟṟukkuṭu
ttom Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattut tiruvekāviṟ tenkarai śrīrudracolai mahādevar Āti
tāsa śaṇḍeśvararkku viṟṟuvilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Innilam Ipparicu viṟṟukkuṭuttu Itannāl vanta vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum maṟa
koṇṭu Itukku Ituve porumāvaṟutip poruṭ celavolaiyumā kku veṇṭum Iṟai dravyamum grahadravyaRead- kraiyatravyammum Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vi
laiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Innilatteṟiṉa kuṭikaḷai Eccoṟum kūṟṟunellum veṭṭi Amaiñci Uḷḷiṭṭu koyil vācalāṟpon=ta kuṭimai Epperppaṭṭa
tum Ūriṭuvarippāṭum kāṭṭap peṟātatākavum Ivvilaikkāṇap paṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Ipparicu sabhaiyār niṉṟu
pāṭakat tirunilakaṇṭakkiramavittaṉum pāṭakattu somavikkiramavitta comāciyārum Iṟāyūr veṇṇaiyakkiramavittaṉum pāṭakattu comiśvarak kiramavittanum pūtalūr
mutta śrītharanampikkiramavittanum paṇiyāl Ipparicuṭṭi viṟṟuk kuṭuttom meṟcollappaṭṭa śrīrudra colai mahādevar Ātitāsa śaṇḍeśvarakku muṟcollappaṭṭa
veṇkuḷattūr mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ipparicu sabhai Uḷniṉṟu paṇikeṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉ civak
koḻuntu cantiracekaraneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pāṭakattut tiruveṅkaṭakkiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ pāṭaka
ttut tirupporikkiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pāṭakattu tiruppaṉaṅkāṭakkiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven pākkattu Ētakkiramavi
ttaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivvūr kāvirakaṇṭi kāmakkoṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven kuvaṇṭūr cītarakkiramavittanen Ippaṭi yaṟiven maṇapāt
taruḷāḷakkiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven mākaṟatiruvaṉeṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiven maṟuvāppākkattu poṉṉaiyak kiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven vai
tāsaṉ naṭuvāyūr kallūr cak paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ mogalluyanupaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven mogallun kecuvaneṉa
Ippaṭiyaṟiven cuntarattoḷ tāsakkirama śrīrāmadāsadāsaneṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 30.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
